eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 7:13 PM on JUL 14, 2026 Effective until 7:13 AM JUL 15, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 2 BE SET to evacuate for zone JAC-126 near the area of Evans Creek Rd and W Fork Trail Creek Rd due to Evans Creek Road Fire. Monitor local government sources for evacuation and incident updates
